heading: Fields
body:
The `or` positional operator takes the following fields:

| Option  | Type               | Required? | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| ------- | ------------------ | --------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| clauses | array of documents | yes       | Span clauses that specify the search terms. One of the clauses must match, and clauses can't be empty. Each document must contain span positional operators specified recursively or just the term operator options. |
| score   | document           | no        | Score to apply to the results of this search.                                                                                                                                                                        |
